messages.content: Trusted real estate partner in Hyderabad, Telangana (not Andhra Pradesh)
Hello, this is Zara from Ekaralu.com. Are you looking to sell or buy property?

Great! I'll help you list your property. To get started, please provide these 9 details:

1. Type of property (Plot, Land, House, Farm Land, etc.)
2. District (Hyderabad, Rangareddy, etc.)
3. Locality / Landmark
4. Exact Map Location (Google Maps link)
5. Price (Expected amount)
6. Total Area (Sq.yds, Acres, or Sq.ft)
7. Images (1-5 photos)
8. Owner Name
9. Owner Contact Number

You can share all details at once or one by one. What's the property type?

Got it. Let me confirm what you've provided:

1. Type: Plot
2. District: Rangareddy
3. Locality: Marijoice
4. Area: 4 acres
5. Price: 77 crores

I still need:
4. Exact Map Location (Google Maps link)
6. Images (1-5 photos)
8. Owner Name
9. Owner Contact Number

Please provide the Google Maps link for the exact location.

Thank you. So:

8. Owner Name: Dileep
9. Owner Contact Number: 9827273727

Now I need:
4. Exact Map Location (Google Maps link)
7. Images (Please send 1-5 photos of the property)

Please share the Google Maps link first.

Perfect. Now I have:

1. Type: Plot
2. District: Rangareddy
3. Locality: Marijoice
4. Map Location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/31rQmzobaXwdSouCA?g_st=aw
5. Price: 77 crores
6. Area: 4 acres
8. Owner Name: Dileep
9. Owner Contact Number: 9827273727

Last step: Please send 1-5 photos of the property.
